Document:
# Medicines
Medicine and chems are essential for surviving the Wasteland. Knowing what to use and when can mean the difference between life and death. Most medical supplies can be found in first aid kits, looted from enemies, or purchased from traveling doctors and merchants — but the craftable ones can mean the difference between life and death when you're far from civilization.
## Tools
A mortar and pestle is required to process ingredients for many medical recipes. Craft one from two wooden planks.
Ingredients:
## Wound Care
[color=#a4885c]Dirty gauze[/color] is a last-resort wound dressing. It stops bleeding but carries a risk of infection. Craft it from cloth strips.
Ingredients:
[color=#a4885c]Clean gauze[/color] and [color=#a4885c]ointment[/color] are sterile supplies found in first aid kits and medical caches. Clean gauze treats cuts and punctures without infection risk. Ointment treats burns and cold damage.
## Healing Powder
A tribal remedy that accelerates natural healing. Nauseating but effective. Craft it from broc flower and xander root — no workbench required, just crush them together.
Ingredients:
## Cleansing Powder
A field remedy used by tribal and Legion healers to purge radiation. Craft it from irradiated cave fungus and xander root in the medical tab of the crafting menu.
Ingredients:
## Healing Poultice
A more advanced natural remedy combining multiple plant extracts. Heals common ailments slowly but surpasses healing powder for sustained recovery.
Ingredients:
## Stimpaks
[color=#a4885c]Stimpaks[/color] are the backbone of Wasteland medicine — injectable serums that rapidly accelerate the body's healing. Craft a standard stimpak by combining broc flower and xander root with a syringe and a bloodpack.
Ingredients:
[color=#a4885c]Dirty stimpaks[/color] and [color=#a4885c]super stimpaks[/color] cannot be crafted. Dirty stimpaks are found in poor condition throughout the Wasteland; super stimpaks are manufactured goods sold by doctors and traders.
## Jet Inhaler
A Jet inhaler is a crafting component used to make a RadAway inhaler. On its own it only delivers the Jet chem. Craft the empty inhaler body from a sheet of plastic.
Ingredients:
## Hydra
Hydra can be assembled in the crafting menu once you have the right wasteland chems. Build or acquire an empty hydra inhaler shell, then combine it with one Jet inhaler and one Turbo inhaler in the medical tab.
Ingredients:
## RadAway Inhaler
Flushes radiation from the bloodstream. Assemble the inhaler body first (see Jet Inhaler above), then attach a glass phial loaded with RadAway reagent.
Assembly steps:
[color=#a4885c]RadAway phials[/color] and [color=#a4885c]RadAway bloodbags[/color] are also found as standalone items throughout the Wasteland.
## Antidotes and Other Remedies
These items cannot be crafted and must be found or purchased — looted from enemies, bought from traveling doctors, or discovered in medical caches across the Wasteland.
## Pills, Canisters, and Chems
Pills and canisters are pre-manufactured and cannot be crafted. They are found in medical caches, purchased from doctors, or looted from enemies.
[color=#a4885c]Warning:[/color] Prolonged chem use leads to addiction. Fixer can treat most addictions, but availability is not guaranteed.
